mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName" FROM material_arrival a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.projectName}, '%') AND p.name LIKE '%' || #{params.projectName} || '%'
AND a.arrival_at >= #{params.startDate} AND a.arrival_at <= #{params.endDate}
ORDER BY a.arrival_at DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName" FROM material_arrival a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by WHERE a.id = #{id}
